title: commersonia corniculata
intro: Commersonia corniculata, also known as the pink native pea or pink bush pea, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Commersonia corniculata typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
